# claude-swarm

> A CLI for coordinating multiple Claude Code sessions working on the same codebase. Shared context, messaging, file claims, peer reviews, and a serialized git lock — all backed by a single SQLite database.

## Install

    pip install claude-swarm
    brew tap laurenalexander2/tap && brew install claude-swarm

Requires Python 3.11+.

## Quick Start

    ao start "Build a REST API with auth" # launch orchestrator mode

## Documentation

- [Complete Reference](https://laurenalexander2.github.io/agent-orchestrator/llms-full.txt): Every command, every schema table, full workflow — everything in one file
- [CLI Reference](https://laurenalexander2.github.io/agent-orchestrator/commands.txt): All commands with synopsis, options, defaults, and examples
- [Database Schema](https://laurenalexander2.github.io/agent-orchestrator/schema.txt): All 6 CREATE TABLE statements with field descriptions and behavioral notes
- [Docs](https://laurenalexander2.github.io/agent-orchestrator/docs.html): Install, human commands, agent commands

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/laurenalexander2/agent-orchestrator): Source code, issues, PRs
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/claude-swarm/): Package registry

## Optional

- [Homepage](https://laurenalexander2.github.io/agent-orchestrator/): Overview, example walkthrough, quick start
